message:
security+fix: timing-safe auth, improved ETag, and robust localhost detection

## Security Hardening (health/status/route.ts)

- Replace direct string comparison for admin token with timing-safe
  comparison using crypto.timingSafeEqual(). This prevents timing attacks
  that could leak token bytes by measuring response time differences.

- Handle length mismatch case securely: when lengths differ, perform a
  dummy comparison (expectedBuf vs expectedBuf) to maintain constant time
  before returning false.

## ETag Improvement (prompts/route.ts)

- Include bundles and workflows in the registry hash computation, not
  just prompts. This ensures the ETag changes when any part of the
  registry content changes, enabling proper HTTP caching behavior.

## Localhost Detection Fix (admin/permissions.ts)

- Add dedicated isLocalHost() and isLocalOrigin() helper functions that
  properly handle all localhost variants:
  - localhost
  - 127.0.0.1
  - [::1] (IPv6 loopback)
  - Ports (strips port before comparison)

- Use these helpers in checkAdminPermission() for more robust dev bypass
  detection. The previous string includes() check was fragile and could
  miss edge cases like IPv6 or port numbers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
